replies: Hello! 👋 Ask me about any crop price — e.g. 'Wheat in Central' or 'Rice price'.
Hi there! I know prices for Wheat, Rice, Onion, and Tomato across markets. What would you like to know?
Hey! How can I help? Try asking: 'price of Onion in North'.
You're welcome! 😊 Ask anytime.
Happy to help! Anything else?
Glad I could help!
Goodbye! Come back anytime for fresh prices. 🌾
See you! Happy farming. 👋
Bye! Take care.

patterns: \b(who are you|what are you|your name|about you)\b
replies: I'm the Farm Price Assistant 🌾 — I give you live crop prices across markets. Try: 'Rice in South'.

I can look up crop prices! Just ask:
• 'Price of Wheat'
• 'Onion in North'
• 'Rice in Central market'
Available crops: Wheat, Rice, Onion, Tomato. Markets: Central, North, South.
__CROPS__
__MARKETS__
Do you mean the price of Rice? Try 'Rice in Central' or 'Rice price today'.
If you want Rice prices now, specify a market: e.g. 'Rice in South'.
Do you mean the price of Wheat? Try 'Wheat in Central' or 'Wheat price today'.
To get Wheat prices, specify a market: e.g. 'Wheat in North'.
Do you mean the price of Onion? Try 'Onion in North' or 'Onion price today'.
Specify market for Onion prices, e.g. 'Onion in Central'.
Do you mean the price of Tomato? Try 'Tomato in South' or 'Tomato price today'.
Specify market for Tomato prices, e.g. 'Tomato in Central'.
